title: Sahaayane Sahaayane Lyrics Sattai
stanzas:
Sahaayane Sahaayane
nenjukkul nee muzhaithaai
Sahaayane sahaayane
ennai nee yen parithaai

Un ennangal thaakki
en kannangal pookka
Nee vayathukku
vaasam thanthaai

Oru murai un perai
udhadugal sonnaale
Pasi indri povathenna

Pala murai sonnaalum
urangida ennaamal
Vizhi rendum kaetpathenna

Thavari vizhundha
porul pol
enai eduthaayada.
Thavanai muraiyil
unai naan
sirai pidithenada.

Pillai pole
ennai kaiyil yendhu
Ellai yethum illai
anbil neendhu neendhu

Kanavilum kaanaatha
vagaiyinil un thottram
Enakkulle koochal poda

Idhu varai ketkaatha
isai ena un pechu
Alavilla aattam poda

Kallap paarvai
ennai koththi thinna
Enna yethu endru
ullam enna enna

Sahaayane Sahaayane
nenjukkul nee muzhaithaai
Sahaayane sahaayane
ennai nee yen parithaai

Un ennangal thaakki
en kannangal pookka
Nee vayathukku
vaasam thanthaai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Sahaayane Sahaayane expresses themes of love and support, highlighting the bond between partners.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Sattai, the song plays during a pivotal moment that showcases the deep connection between the lead characters.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Shreya Ghoshal and composed by D Imman.

When was the song released?

Sahaayane Sahaayane was released on January 14, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sahaayane Sahaayane, the song beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and companionship, making it a standout track in Sattai. The lyrics convey a sense of deep connection and support, resonating with anyone who has experienced love. Shreya Ghoshal's soothing vocals, combined with D Imman's melodic composition, evoke feelings of warmth and nostalgia. This song is perfect for romantic occasions, celebrating the essence of togetherness.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sahaayane Sahaayane from Sattai is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and companionship. With Shreya Ghoshal's enchanting vocals and D Imman's soulful composition, this song resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the magic of heartfelt lyrics and soothing tunes that make this track a must-listen for romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: You have filled my heart, O helper. You are my protector.
You have taken my feelings and made them bloom in my eyes. You have given a home to my heart.
O helper, you have filled my heart.
When I call your name once, what does it matter if I feel hungry?
Even if you say it many times, what does it matter if I don't sleep?
Like a fallen object, you have taken me. I have captured you in my way.
Like a child, you hold me in your hands. There is no boundary, just love.
O helper, you have filled my heart. O helper.
In dreams, your praise does not appear. It stirs within me.
This music that has not been heard until now, your words are not enough for the dance.
This is the state that arises from two becoming two.
You have given me the blessing of joy and happiness.
The gaze of a stone pierces me. What do I want, my heart asks.
O helper, you have filled my heart. You are my protector.
You have taken my feelings and made them bloom in my eyes. You have given a home to my heart.
